feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: OpenAI film 'Artificial,' dropped by Amazon, finds a new home with Neon
entry.content: “Artificial,” Luca Guadagnino’s starry film about Sam Altman and OpenAI, has been acquired by the indie distributor Neon after it was dropped by Amazon MGM Studios

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
A conclusion is simply the place where you got tired of thinking.
Lucky Numbers: 48, 82, 17, 1, 40, 73

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Use BEES WAX to waterproof your shoes.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: The glue on Israeli postage is certified kosher.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — George Bernard Shaw
entry.content: “People who say it cannot be done should not interrupt those who are doing it.” — George Bernard Shaw

entry.title: Trump’s financial disclosure lists $1.4 billion in crypto earnings, powered largely by meme coins
entry.content: The annual report also included $80 million in income from settlements tied to lawsuits he filed against companies like ABC, CBS, Meta and YouTube.

entry.title: New details in deadly Florida alligator attack
entry.content: New details in deadly Florida alligator attack

entry.title: Startup Battlefield Australia application closes in days: Apply before July 6
entry.content: What if one pitch changed everything? The next company nobody has heard of yet is building something that will matter. It could be yours.

entry.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s push to end birthright citizenship
entry.content: President Trump is slamming a Supreme Court decision that blocked his attempt to end automatic citizenship for the children of undocumented immigrants born in the U.S. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

entry.title: Trump Made More Than $1 Billion on Crypto Deals, Part of 2025 Windfall
entry.content: The president also brought in vast sums from licensing and legal settlements, according to his latest financial disclosure report.

entry.title: Disneyland to offer $59 evening tickets next month
entry.content: Disneyland Resort is commemorating its 70th anniversary through Aug. 9, and has introduced new shows and additions to rides as part of the occasion.

entry.title: Wall Street’s Best Quarter in Six Years Will Be a Hard Act to Follow
entry.content: The Dow industrials closed June at a record high. The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq composite rose 15% and 21%, respectively, in the second quarter.

entry.title: Satellite TV Provider Dish DBS Files for Bankruptcy Following AT&T Deal Snag
entry.content: The EchoStar pay-TV subsidiary said it would repay debt once the $20 billion AT&T spectrum deal closes.

entry.title: OpenClaw is finally available on Android and iOS
entry.content: The free open source agentic program is finally invading your phone.

entry.title: He thought old-school Hollywood silent films were missing one thing — Minions
entry.content: French animator Pierre Coffin created the Minions and still voices them. For the new movie, he wanted to pay homage to Hollywood's silent clowns.

entry.title: Anthropic's new Sonnet 5 model is better at the tasks that are running up enterprise bills
entry.content: Anthropic trained its newest Sonnet model to excel at agentic tasks, which have been causing a headache for the company's enterprise customers and power users.

entry.title: France vs. Sweden live score, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup knockout game
entry.content: Free-scoring France face Sweden in a mouthwatering Round of 32 clash at the World Cup.

entry.title: Xbox layoff plans reportedly include closing Arkane, canceling Blade
entry.content: The cuts will apparently start next week.

entry.title: Serena Williams vs. Maya Joint live score, result and highlights as Wimbledon 2026 comeback ends in defeat
entry.content: The Sporting News was tracking live score updates and highlights from Serena Williams' first match at Wimbledon since 2022.

entry.title: Bulls free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NBA offseason
entry.content: Chicago has plenty of needs and plenty of cap space.

entry.title: Pistons free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NBA offseason
entry.content: This summer will be about building on a good thing for the Pistons.

entry.title: Celtics free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NBA offseason
entry.content: Boston has a lot to be figured out this offseason.

entry.title: 76ers free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NBA offseason
entry.content: Philadelphia is a team with players on different timelines.

entry.title: Clippers free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NBA offseason
entry.content: Los Angeles will have to make some decisions on key players.

entry.title: Mavericks free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NBA offseason
entry.content: Dallas is trying to build around a star player with a new coach.

entry.title: 'Zorro' is L.A.'s masked hero, but France makes him magnifique
entry.content: Jean Dujardin stars in this wonderful French take on the masked vigilante, who has been out of the hero game for 20 years and jumps back in.

entry.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
entry.content: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

entry.title: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
entry.content: EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.

entry.title: Report: Marxist tycoon is funding a China-backed influence campaign against AI data centers
entry.content: A China-based American tycoon is funding a Beijing-backed influence campaign in the U.S. to block construction of large computer data centers, according to a new think tank report.

entry.title: Netflix used AI to put Gene Wilder's voice into a new reality show
entry.content: So much for magic.

entry.title: Stocks Rise, the Yen Slides
entry.content: Plus, a quiet Fed only makes investors listen harder.

entry.title: The Supreme Court will hear an appeal in the long-running case between Apple and Epic Games
entry.content: Apple filed an appeal after being found in contempt of an order related to App Store fees.

entry.title: Moses Itauma ordered to fight for IBF heavyweight title after Oleksandr Usyk gives up his belts
entry.content: Itauma and Frank Sanchez have until July 29 to reach an agreement for the bout or purse bids will be called.

entry.title: LeBron James next team odds 2026: Will LBJ join Stephen Curry, Draymond Green on Warriors? Reunion with Heat?
entry.content: LeBron James Potential Free Agent Destinations

entry.title: Oklahoma Sooners target sets commitment date
entry.content: Oklahoma Sooners defensive target in the 2027 recruiting class sets a decision date.

entry.title: Pair of former Dolphins named to All-PFF Team of last 20 years
entry.content: The Miami Dolphins don't have the most talented roster in the league right now, but two of their former players are earning respect for their careers.

entry.title: 2027 Tennessee baseball commit named to TSWA All-State Team
entry.content: A 2027 Tennessee baseball commit is named to the TSWA All-State Team.

entry.title: Washington women's basketball adds national champion to coaching staff
entry.content: The Washington Huskies hired former UCLA assistant Tasha Brown as an assistant coach in the women's basketball program on Friday.

entry.title: Frequent AI chatbot use linked to belief in anti-vaccine myths, poll finds
entry.content: Poll finds use of AI tools for health advice is correlated with belief in vaccine falsehoods, such as shots causing autismAdults in the US who frequently seek out health advice from artificial intelligence chatbots are more likely to believe myths about vaccines, according to a poll released on Tuesday by health research firm KFF.The survey, which was conducted in May and polled a representative sample of 2,480 US adults, found that use of AI tools and chatbots correlated with belief in falsehoods such as vaccines causing autism or that the measles vaccine poses more danger than the corresponding virus. The connection remained while controlling for factors such as age, race, education and political partisanship. Continue reading...

entry.title: British regulator may challenge Paramount takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery
entry.content: 'For US consumers, this merger has become a proxy fight about political influence and control of media,' according to Forrester Research. 'In the UK, it's being treated as a structural competition issue where regulators, not consumers, will decide.'

entry.title: FDA scientists flag concerns with peptides, the trendy molecules RFK Jr. supports
entry.content: Documents reviewing the research on peptides note lack of good evidence of efficacy or safety. Yet an FDA panel will consider easing access to them later this month.

entry.title: ‘Tonnes of rubble’: 58,000 buildings estimated destroyed in Venezuela earthquakes
entry.content: Preliminary analysis of satellite data suggests magnitude of natural disaster could dwarf official estimatesMore than 58,000 buildings may have been damaged and destroyed by the twin earthquakes that hit Venezuela last week, according to a preliminary analysis of satellite data that suggests the scale of the destruction could dwarf official estimates.Last Wednesday’s back-to-back quakes – which measured magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 – killed at least 1,943 people, injured more than 10,571, and left tens of thousands missing amid the rubble. The UN migration agency has said that up to 6.8 million people could be affected by the disasters, and would require shelter, water, sanitation, healthcare and essential relief items. Continue reading...

entry.title: Maple Leafs may need Matthew Knies package to land Zach Werenski
entry.content: The Toronto Maple Leafs are expected to pursue defenseman Zach Werenski, who is the reigning Norris Trophy winner, given to the best NHL defenseman for his overall impact. And if the Columbus Blue Jackets make him available, the cost could…

entry.title: Executives discuss revenue share rise + 'Protect College Sports' act timeline + Comcast spins off NBC Universal
entry.content: Steven Godfrey and Ross Dellenger dive into the potential rise in revenue share, Ross gives an update on the 'Protect College Sports' act and a closer look at how NBC Universal spinning off from Comcast will impact college football.

entry.title: Grimaldo realises goal of Atletico Madrid move from Leverkusen
entry.content: Alejandro Grimaldo said he had realised a long-term ambition to play for one of Spain's biggest clubs after joining Atletico Madrid on Tuesday for a reported fee of 20 million euros ($23 million) from Bayer Leverkusen."I believe Atletico Madrid is one of Spain's big clubs.

entry.title: Former UFC fighter Trey Waters heads to PFL Summer Series
entry.content: Ultimate Fighting Championship veteran Trey Waters has signed with Professional Fighters League and will debut in the SmartCage on Aug. 7, in Charlotte, North Carolina, for one of the company’s upcoming Summer Series events, sources tell Sherdog.com.

entry.title: Spurs agree £85m deal for West Ham's Fernandes
entry.content: Tottenham agree a deal to sign West Ham's Mateus Fernandes as Manchester United pull out of the race for midfielder.

entry.title: 3 Steelers, past and present, make PFF All-Time list
entry.content: One Steelers legend and two more on the team made the cut on PFF's All-Time team from the last 20 years.

entry.title: Home Run Derby 2026 field: Rays' Junior Caminero, last year's runner-up, first participant announced
entry.content: The 2026 Home Run Derby will take place at 8 p.m. ET on July 13 at Philadelphia's Citizens Bank Park.

entry.title: Florida Panthers acquire goaltender Jacob Markstrom in a trade with the Devils
entry.content: Markstrom, 36, is beginning a two-year contract at an annual salary cap hit of $6 million.

entry.title: Quiz: How Well Do You Know These Regional American Dishes?
entry.content: To celebrate the country’s milestone year—and its many local flavors—put your epicurean expertise to the test

entry.title: What does the Amos report reveal about maternity and neonatal care in England?
entry.content: Amos review confirms patients received unacceptable care that led to stillbirths, serious injuries and maternal deathsDamning report on maternity care in England is a ‘watershed moment’Valerie Amos, a Labour peer and former diplomat, has published her long-awaited review into maternity and neonatal care across England. This is what we know: Continue reading...

entry.title: Saudi sovereign-wealth fund Struggles to Find Winning Investments
entry.content: PIF’s performance adds to the country’s economic challenges, which were growing even before the war in Iran.

entry.title: The largest digital camera ever built begins decade-long survey of the universe
entry.content: The largest digital camera ever built is beginning to capture images of unseen corners of the universe in finer detail

entry.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
entry.content: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.

entry.title: Mississippi district attorney pleads guilty to bribery conspiracy and resigns
entry.content: A Mississippi district attorney has pleaded guilty to bribery conspiracy and resigned his post

entry.title: America’s Birthday Milestones in WSJ: 150, 200 and 250
entry.content: How The Wall Street Journal covered America’s 150th and 200th birthdays (in 1926 and 1976), plus a shout-out to the current one in 2026.

entry.title: What Kind of Leader Makes for a Great President?
entry.content: We asked historians, journalists and others to identify one lesson from the legacies of the most-consequential president and first ladies. Here are four of them.

entry.title: Six feared dead after ‘bizarre’ sinking of charter boat off Canadian coast
entry.content: The vessel, thought to have been carrying 10 people, did not issue a mayday call before sinking in the strait of GeorgiaSearch teams in Canada have launched a recovery effort for six people believed to have drowned in a “bizarre” sinking of a fishing charter off the coast of Vancouver.Police and rescue crews praised a couple who were passing in their yacht for making a critical mayday call and saving stranded passengers by pulling them onboard their craft. Continue reading...

entry.title: '47 Ronin' director Carl Erik Rinsch sentenced to 30 months in prison for Netflix fraud case
entry.content: Carl Erik Rinsch, the director known for '47 Ronin' and 'White Horse,' was sentenced Monday to more than two years in federal prison. He was convicted of defrauding Netflix of $11 million.

entry.title: Supreme Court Upholds State Restrictions on Transgender Athletes
entry.content: The decision will let 27 states keep bans on transgender women and girls playing for female sports teams.

entry.title: Supreme Court Strikes Down Key Limit on Campaign Spending by Political Parties
entry.content: At issue was how much money the parties can spend in coordination with candidates for public office.

entry.title: Supreme Court Rejects Trump’s Bid to Curtail Birthright Citizenship
entry.content: The decision delivers a rebuke to the president on one of his signature policies.

entry.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s attempt to limit birthright citizenship
entry.content: Delivering a major blow to President Donald Trump, the Supreme Court on Tuesday blocked his contentious attempt to limit citizenship at birth for people born on U.S. soil.

entry.title: Supreme Court strikes down long-standing campaign finance restrictions
entry.content: The Supreme Court struck down longtime campaign finance rules challenged by Vice President JD Vance that place limits on how much a national political party committee can spend in coordination with individual candidates.

entry.title: Supreme Court upholds transgender bans in girls’ and women’s sports
entry.content: Delivering another major blow to LGBTQ rights, the Supreme Court on Tuesday upheld state laws that ban transgender athletes from participating in girls' and women's sports.

entry.title: Wildfires in Colorado rapidly spread, destroying buildings and forcing evacuations
entry.content: New wildfires have quickly spread across tens of thousands of acres in Colorado, forcing people to evacuate from their homes and destroying buildings. Rob Marciano and Jonah Kaplan have the latest.

entry.title: Where Will Tesla Stock Be in 5 Years?
entry.content: Where Will Tesla Stock Be in 5 Years?

entry.title: Is MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. (MPLT) Stock a Biotech Opportunity Ahead of the ZEPHYR Trial Readout?
entry.content: Is MapLight Therapeutics, Inc. (MPLT) Stock a Biotech Opportunity Ahead of the ZEPHYR Trial Readout?

entry.title: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX) Outlook Strengthens as Analysts See Major Opportunity in Hidradenitis Suppurativa
entry.content: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX) Outlook Strengthens as Analysts See Major Opportunity in Hidradenitis Suppurativa

entry.title: Cypriot natural gas could start flowing from ExxonMobil's discoveries by 2033
entry.content: Natural gas could start flowing from two undersea deposits ExxonMobil discovered off Cyprus by 2033, the company's Vice President of Global Exploration John Ardill said, helping to turn the east Mediterranean island nation into a new European energy hub

entry.title: Is Definium Therapeutics, Inc. (DFTX) Stock Poised for Further Gains After Positive Emerge Trial Update?
entry.content: Is Definium Therapeutics, Inc. (DFTX) Stock Poised for Further Gains After Positive Emerge Trial Update?

entry.title: Is Zymeworks Inc. (ZYME) Stock an Undervalued Biotech Opportunity With Oncology Growth Ahead?
entry.content: Is Zymeworks Inc. (ZYME) Stock an Undervalued Biotech Opportunity With Oncology Growth Ahead?

entry.title: Is Celldex Therapeutics, Inc. (CLDX) Stock Positioned for Growth Ahead of Potential 2027 Approval?
entry.content: Is Celldex Therapeutics, Inc. (CLDX) Stock Positioned for Growth Ahead of Potential 2027 Approval?

entry.title: Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. (NRIX) Price Target Raised to $33 on Roche Partnership Value
entry.content: Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. (NRIX) Price Target Raised to $33 on Roche Partnership Value

entry.title: Rescuers cling to hope for survivors 6 days after Venezuela earthquakes
entry.content: The earthquakes that hit Venezuela 6 days ago may have damaged or destroyed 58,000 buildings, NASA says, as rescuers race the clock to find survivors.

entry.title: 3 advantages homebuyers should know this summer, according to experts
entry.content: Even with mortgage interest rates high, buyers may have some timely advantages this summer. Here are three to know.

entry.title: Colorado residents "might be coming home to nothing" as wildfires rage, evacuated woman says
entry.content: High winds and low humidity are fueling raging wildfires in Colorado. Several firefighters have been killed amid efforts to contain the flames. CBS News correspondent Jonah Kaplan reports.

entry.title: Inside the desperate search for trapped earthquake survivors in Venezuela
entry.content: Time is running out for survivors trapped in rubble nearly a week after deadly earthquakes rocked Venezuela. CBS News' Camilo Montoya-Galvez spoke with families and rescue workers.

entry.title: Ukrainian construction tycoon possibly targeted in Monaco explosion
entry.content: French and Ukrainian media say an explosive device left in a Monaco apartment building seriously wounded construction magnate Vadym Iermolaiev and his wife.

entry.title: JetBlue pilot says "we collided with a drone" while landing at JFK
entry.content: The FAA is investigating after a JetBlue pilot said a drone "hit us right above the cockpit" while on its final approach to New York's JFK airport. JetBlue said a post-flight inspection found no signs of damage or any indication of a collision.

entry.title: Maps show heat dome forecast to scorch major U.S. cities this week
entry.content: A heat wave will blast much of the eastern U.S. this week, and forecasters say temperatures will feel even hotter because of the high humidity that's arriving with it.

entry.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
entry.content: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.

entry.title: Nutrition apps can help build healthy habits. For some users, their gaming features carry risks
entry.content: The next time you get a trophy on a smartphone app, it might not be from a game

entry.title: Japanese Yen Falls to 40-Year Low, Pleasing Tourists but Worrying Tokyo
entry.content: The latest slide has put foreign-exchange traders on high alert for a fresh round of yen buying by Japanese authorities.

entry.title: How hot is Dan Quinn's seat entering 2026 season?
entry.content: Dan Quinn and the Washington Commanders had a very disappointing 2025, and the coach probably can't afford another season like that in 2026.

entry.title: Indiana Pacers exercise team option on former Wisconsin Badgers center
entry.content: Today marks the official beginning of NBA free agency, but former Wisconsin Badgers center Micah Potter isn't going anywhere.

entry.title: World Cup Round of 32 bracket: Updated schedule, results for 2026 FIFA knockout round
entry.content: Here's a look at the Round of 32 bracket for the 2026 World Cup.

entry.title: Could Florida produce three 1st-rounders in 2027 NBA draft?
entry.content: All three members of Florida's frontcourt have a chance to be first-round picks in the 2027 NBA draft, according to The Athletic's latest mock.

entry.title: Morocco ousts Netherlands in PKs, earns Round of 16 clash with Canada
entry.content: Morocco netted a stoppage-time equalizer before edging the Netherlands 3-2 in penalty kicks to win a tight Round of 32 match at the 2026 World Cup.

entry.title: How much are the Panthers spending at each offensive position in 2026?
entry.content: Where do the Panthers' priorities lie on offense? Let's break down how much they're spending at each position and where those totals rank in the NFL.

entry.title: Police units deployed across South Africa before anti-immigration marches
entry.content: Government fears repeat of anti-migrant violence in 2008 that led to looting and resulted in deaths of 62 peopleSouth African authorities have deployed police units to towns and cities around the country before planned demonstrations against undocumented foreign nationals.Security personnel were seen patrolling the central business district in Johannesburg, the economic capital, where many shopkeepers decided not to open on Tuesday. Trucks and other assets belonging to the South African National Defence Force were also present, according to local media reports. Continue reading...

entry.title: Commentary: Commemorate America's 250th with these 6 series, historical and satirical
entry.content: As America's 250th anniversary approaches, a number of TV docuseries and web series, both historical and satirical in nature, offer timely civics lessons.

entry.title: As L.A. dance spaces shutter, dancers keep moving through a funding drought
entry.content: As major dance institutions like Bodytraffic and L.A. Contemporary Dance Company close their doors, dancers still persevere. Here's how.

entry.title: How Donny Hathaway turned this soft rock cover into America's defining song
entry.content: Hathaway's gospel-infused arrangement and call-and-response with a crowd at the Troubadour transformed Carole King's song from a private promise into a proclamation of Black resilience.

entry.title: Sequins! Dancing queens! ABBA! Go backstage for 'Mamma Mia!'s' 25th anniversary tour at the Ahmanson
entry.content: Twenty-five years after its Broadway debut, the veteran BTS creatives of "Mamma Mia!" helps turn the Ahmanson Theatre into an ABBA-fueled, multigenerational dance party.

entry.title: Her buzzy new novel is a millennial time capsule, dripping with American Apparel and AIM angst
entry.content: Author Gabrielle Korn discusses "Long Island Girls," a novel tracking a queer millennial's journey from AOL Instant Messenger-era youth to adulthood in a changing media landscape.

entry.title: England knockout tickets: How to buy, pricing, date for Round of 32 match vs. Congo at FIFA World Cup
entry.content: England is ready to bring a World Cup title home. Here's how to see it take on the knockout stage with tickets and seats to its Round of 32 match against DR Congo.

entry.title: Where to watch Liberty vs. Aces: Channel, time, TV schedule, live stream for 2026 WNBA Commissioner's Cup final
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Liberty vs. Aces, including TV channel and streaming options for the Commissioner's Cup final.

entry.title: Where is Bosnia and Herzegovina on a map? A simple guide for USMNT fans at the World Cup
entry.content: Here's where Bosnia and Herzegovina is located in Europe as the nation faces off with the United States at the World Cup.
